Property.name: state
Property.description: The camera's status can be active/inactive

Property.name: created_at
Property.description: The date and time the camera was added to the system, in UTC format

Entity.name: WorkItem
Entity.description: Work performed during the service visit.

Property.name: name
Property.description: Car name, make and model, for example: VOLVO  S80 (2.4), HONDA CIVIC X FC (1.5).

Property.name: phone
Property.description: The customer's phone number in international format.

Property.name: updated_at
Property.description: Date and time of the last camera data update in UTC format

Entity.name: Location
Entity.description: Geolocation of the camera's installation site

Entity.name: Camera
Entity.description: This is an IP camera for a video surveillance system

Property.name: type
Property.description: The client type can only be "Individual" or "Organization".

Entity.name: VideoAnalyticsModule
Entity.description: The video analytics module enabled on the camera

Property.name: updated_at
Property.description: Date of the most recent updates to customer data.

Property.name: depth
Property.description: Video archive retention period in days

Entity.name: ServiceVisit
Entity.description: A central service-event entity representing a customer's vehicle visit to an automotive workshop.

Entity.name: Car
Entity.description: The customer's car is serviced at this service station.
